metadata.title: Enjoy the Silence
metadata.album: The Best of Depeche Mode, Vol. 1 (Deluxe)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:25.93] Words like violence
[00:28.05] Break the silence
[00:30.40] Come crashing in
[00:32.01] Into my little world
[00:34.45] Painful to me
[00:36.40] Pierce right through me
[00:38.74] Can't you understand?
[00:40.72] Oh, my little girl
[00:43.27] All I ever wanted
[00:45.21] All I ever needed
[00:46.63] Is here in my arms
[00:51.32] Words are very unnecessary
[00:55.43] They can only do harm
[01:00.55] 
[01:23.31] Vows are spoken
[01:25.34] To be broken
[01:27.68] Feelings are intense
[01:29.70] Words are trivial
[01:31.98] Pleasures remain
[01:33.98] So does the pain
[01:36.05] Words are meaningless
[01:38.34] And forgettable
[01:40.69] All I ever wanted
[01:42.64] All I ever needed
[01:44.11] Is here in my arms
[01:48.79] Words are very unnecessary
[01:52.75] They can only do harm
